about: Human-readable rules for Tenderly's AI opportunity parser. The model turns an approved source page or JSON feed into records; it never decides whether a volunteer should be matched.

model.reason: Low temperature keeps catalog fields stable. Bounded source text and a longer job-only timeout make extraction reliable without delaying the volunteer-facing API.

promotion_policy.low_confidence_action: Store in opportunity_staging for review; never show it in matching.
promotion_policy.missing_required_field_action: Reject the record and save the reason on the import.
promotion_policy.source_disappears_action: Pause a previously active opportunity only after two successful source runs do not see it.

parser_rules: Extract only volunteer opportunities explicitly present in the supplied source content.
Do not invent location, capacity, requirements, dates, or availability. Use the source defaults only when a field is absent.
Use one of allowed_categories. Choose community when the source does not support a more specific category.
Return a confidence score from 0 through 1 for each record.
Return a single JSON object with one key: opportunities. Its value must be an array of records. Return an empty array when no current volunteer role is present.
